pages.text:
Holiday Calendar 2026

Fixed Public Holidays (*Mandatory)
  Sr No.  Holiday name                      Date             Day
         1      Republic Day                      26th January 2026        Monday
    2     Gandhi Jayanthi                  2nd October 2026            Friday
    3     Vijayadasami                             21st October 2026       Wednesday
    4     Balipadyami Deepavali               10th November 2026        Tuesday
    5     Christmas Day                     25th December 2026           Friday

Optional Public Holidays (*any 5)
  Sr No.  Holiday name                      Date             Day
         1    New Year Eve                                 1st January 2026          Thursday
     2     Makara Sankranti / Uttarayana          15th January 2026         Thursday
    3     Chhatrapati Shivaji Jayanthi            19th February 2026         Thursday
    4      Holi                             2nd March 2026         Monday
    5     Ugadi / Gudi Padwa                    19th March 2026          Thursday
    6      Id ul Fitr                           20th March 2026             Friday
     7    Ram Navami                         27th March 2026             Friday
    8     Mahaveera Jayanthi                      31st March 2026          Tuesday
    9    Good Friday                          3rd April 2026              Friday
     10      Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Jayanthi              14th April 2026           Tuesday
         11     Basava Jayanthi                     20th April 2026         Monday
      12     Labour Day / Buddha Purnima               1st May 2026               Friday
     13     Eid-ul-Adha (Bakrid)                  28th May 2026           Thursday
     14    Muharram                          26th June 2026             Friday
      15     Eid-e-Milad                        26th August 2026       Wednesday
     16     Raksha Bandhan                    28th August 2026            Friday
      17    Janmashtami                      4th September 2026           Friday
     18    Ganesh Chaturthi                    14th September 2026       Monday

19     Vishwakarma Jayanthi                17th September 2026        Thursday
    20    Maha Ashtami                         19th October 2026        Monday
      21    Maha Navami                     20th October 2026         Tuesday
    22     Maharshi Valmiki Jayanthi            26th October 2026        Monday
    23    Chhath Puja                          16th November 2026       Monday
    24    Guru Nanak Jayanthi               24th November 2026        Tuesday
    25     Christmas Eve                     24th December 2026        Thursday


Important Note:
       •  There are total 10 calendar holidays for the year 2026, equally divided into fixed and
           optional holidays.

       •  Team Members are requested honour the Fixed Public holidays.

       •  Team Members can avail any 5-optional leaves from the list of Optional Public Holiday
             in the calendar Year 2026.

       •   Supervisor/ Team leads can use their discretion on the Holidays as per the business
          exigencies and personal requirement of the TeamMember.

       •   All the optional holidays can be availed only after the approval is received by the
         manager on KEKA portal.

       •  Team members are requested to plan leaves and holidays ahead of time so as to avoid
           situations where leave needs to be compulsorily taken at the end of the year.

        Thank-You
